---
title: "adj_r_squared"
generated: true
description: "Per-element adjusted $R^2$ (Gaussian)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:adj_r_squared -->
```python
adj_r_squared(result: GLMResult) -> Float[Array, 'V']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:adj_r_squared -->
Per-element adjusted $R^2$ (Gaussian).

Applies the standard degrees-of-freedom adjustment to `r_squared`,
penalising the number of fitted parameters relative to the number of
observations.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:adj_r_squared -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `result` | `GLMResult` | — | — | A fitted `GLMResult` supplying the deviances, observation count, and residual degrees of freedom. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `V`. `(V,)` adjusted $R^2$, one per element.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:adj_r_squared -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
